issues.title: 0133 transition trigger breaks pre-Spec-2 code (Round-1 #10 not closed)
issues.why: Trigger rejects legacy-state transitions; pre-Spec-2 code still writes finalized/archived.
issues.repair: Compatibility mode: allow finalized->finalized, archived->archived, and whitelisted legacy->legacy/dormant paths until Phase 5 cutover. Or: defer installing trigger until Phase 5 migration, leaving only superset CHECK in Phase 1.
issues.resolution: Applied inline — 0133 extended to admit legacy transitions draft->finalized, finalized->archived, finalized->finalized, archived->archived; still rejects cross-graph (finalized->published).

issues.title: 0139 ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT names an index not a constraint
issues.why: ON CONSTRAINT resolves via pg_constraint; unique index name is not a constraint → migration aborts.
issues.repair: Use index-inference conflict target matching the expression/predicate, or guarded INSERT … WHERE NOT EXISTS.
issues.resolution: Applied inline — switched to ON CONFLICT (event_type, (payload_json->>'spec'), (payload_json->>'to')) WHERE event_type='role_capabilities_version_bump' DO NOTHING.

issues.title: 0135 signoff lacks invariant tying instance_id to stage_instance_id
issues.why: Denormalized approval_instance_id on signoffs can drift from approval_stage_instances.approval_instance_id of the referenced stage — corrupts SoD/tenant guarantees.
issues.repair: Composite FK (stage_instance_id, approval_instance_id) REFERENCES approval_stage_instances(id, approval_instance_id) — requires UNIQUE(id, approval_instance_id) on stage_instances. Alternative: BEFORE INSERT trigger asserting match.
issues.resolution: Applied inline — added UNIQUE(id, approval_instance_id) on approval_stage_instances and composite FK on approval_signoffs.

issues.title: 0136 revoked_by_required CHECK added before backfill
issues.why: Pre-existing rows with effective_to NOT NULL and revoked_by NULL abort constraint creation.
issues.repair: Add CHECK NOT VALID, backfill revoked_by (or revoked_by:='system:legacy'), then VALIDATE.
issues.resolution: Applied inline — CHECK added NOT VALID, backfill step inserts 'system:legacy' where missing, VALIDATE CONSTRAINT runs after.

issues.title: 0137 missing USAGE grant on metaldocs schema to SECURITY DEFINER owner
issues.why: In hardened envs without PUBLIC USAGE on metaldocs, SECURITY DEFINER functions fail to read iam_users despite table-level grants.
issues.repair: GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA metaldocs TO metaldocs_security_owner, metaldocs_membership_writer.
issues.resolution: Applied inline — explicit USAGE grant added in 0137.

action_taken: All 5 fixes applied inline. Co-plan rule caps at Round 2; plan delivered with caveats. User should review before Phase 2 begins.
caveats: Two structural fixes (#1, #3) applied without third Codex round — verify at Phase 1 execution time.
Composite FK on approval_stage_instances(id, approval_instance_id) requires UNIQUE(id, approval_instance_id) which is redundant with PK but accepted by Postgres.
